item.text: I’m checking the workspace `Cargo.toml` files directly to find crates that declare `orbit-knowledge` as a dependency, excluding the workspace root membership entry. After that I’ll verify each hit against the specific dependency section in its own crate manifest.

I have the crate manifest list now. Next I’m reading only the manifests that mention `orbit-knowledge` and checking whether each mention sits under a dependency section rather than just package metadata.
